title: coap_dtn.c: global s_last_confession rate limit violates per-IID requirement (one node can starve all others)
close_reason: Rate limit now per-IID via s_last_confession[slot] keyed by IPv6 addr last byte preventing starvation. 3 codereview passes (wy6k,0ots,tfwd) filed+fixed+closed. Includes net_ip.h added. Mimicked router.c extract and s_* patterns. No comments added.
